title: 3 Pcs Variable Length Screwdriver Set (5", 6", 7") | Handy Small Screwdriver for Daily DIY | Reliable mini Screwdriver | Home Repair Tool Kit (Yellow)
features: [3 PRACTICAL SIZES INCLUDED] Be prepared for any household task. This versatile set includes 5-inch, 6-inch, and 7-inch lengths, providing you with the exact reach and leverage needed for different depths and applications

[RELIABLE PRECISION TIPS] Work with confidence and accuracy. The hardened, precisely machined tips are designed to fit snugly into screw heads, preventing slipping or stripping and ensuring a secure drive every time

[COMFORTABLE ANTI-SLIP GRIP] Enjoy maximum torque with minimal effort. The handles are crafted with an ergonomic, grooved texture that ensures a firm, slip-resistant grip even when you are applying significant pressure

[VERSATILE EVERYDAY ESSENTIAL] Whether you are assembling flat-pack furniture or tightening loose cabinet hinges, each handy small screwdriver in this kit serves as an indispensable addition to your home toolbox

[HIGH VISIBILITY YELLOW SET] Get everything you need with 3 essential tools. The vibrant yellow colour makes your trusty mini screwdriver extremely easy to spot quickly, even when buried in a cluttered drawer or dark toolbag
description: Tackle Every DIY Task with the Perfect Length! Having the right tool for the job makes all the difference. Whether you are assembling furniture, fixing a loose cabinet door, or performing routine household maintenance, our 3-Piece Yellow Screwdriver Set provides the perfect balance of comfort and control. Why This 3-Piece Set is a Must-Have: - Versatile Lengths (5", 6", 7"): With three distinct sizes, you always have the ideal reach. Use the shorter 5-inch tool as a handy small screwdriver for closer work, and the longer ones for deeper screws. - Precision Drive: The durable, non-magnetic tips ensure a snug fit into fasteners, reducing the risk of damaging the screw head during your repairs. - High Visibility: The bright yellow handles ensure your reliable mini screwdriver is always easy to find, saving you time when searching through a dark toolbox. Everyday Applications: Perfect for adjusting door hardware, assembling flat-pack furniture, general home repairs, and professional maintenance. Add this essential, multi-size kit to your tool collection today and always have the right size on hand!
